title: amaryllis × costata
intro: Amaryllis × costata, also known as the Amaryllis or Belladonna Lily, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its alkaloids which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Amaryllis × costata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
